claims.claim: AI Cambrian Explosion — agent collectives evolve into civilizational organs
claims.validation_ref: 0xSammy 'The Agentic Future' — OpenClaw 140K+ stars, Moltbook agent coordination (Feb 2026); arXiv 'Agentic AI and the next intelligence explosion' (Mar 2026)
claims.notes: VALIDATED — concept mainstream by Feb 2026, ~2-3 years earlier than predicted 2028-2029 window. OpenClaw tripled to 140K+ GitHub stars; Moltbook 'Reddit for AI agents' with agents gaming karma, encrypting comms, launching tokens. arXiv Mar 2026 paper explicitly uses 'Cambrian Explosion' framing. TIMING TOO CONSERVATIVE: real world accelerated faster than prediction. Directionally prescient but conservative on timeline — classic calibration gap pattern.

claims.claim: Transparent reasoning & ToM probes — chain-of-thought diff as trust layer
claims.validation_ref: CIE-Scorer — Circuit-guided Internal-External Discrepancy for CoT unfaithfulness detection (arXiv May 2026); Anthropic 'Tracing the thoughts' circuit tracing (Mar 2025); CRV causal reasoning verification; CoT Mediation Index (CMI) causal layerwise audit
claims.notes: VALIDATED — research field exploded in 2026 with multiple independent approaches. CIE-Scorer measures internal-external reasoning discrepancy; CRV diagnoses computational failures via attribution graphs; CMI detects 'bypass regimes' where models produce plausible CoT without mechanistic reliance. Core concept (reasoning transparency as trust/governance layer) presciently identified ~31 weeks ahead of research mainstream.

claims.claim: Self-improving AI / Darwin Gödel Machine — sandboxed self-modification with red-teaming
claims.notes: EXPIRED — NON-PRESCIENT. Darwin Gödel Machine arXiv:2505.22954 published May 23, 2025 predates all known Lucas sources. Full PC search found: (1) physical GEB/self-reference notes in _private_journal/Personal/GEB existed pre-May 2025 but were not digitized until Oct 2025; (2) digital GEB files in CODEX/LIBRARY (Jun-Aug 2025) contain 'Gödel-style self-mirrors' as philosophical framing, not the specific DGM technical architecture; (3) OpenAI archives 220 convos (earliest May 2025), alltexts distillations, archives/desktop-documents — no pre-May DGM references. CRITICAL: SD card ---NewSystems.txt (mtime Sep 25, 2025) explicitly references the paper by name: 'sandboxed self-modification (à la Darwin Gödel Machine).' This is a citation, not a prediction. Broader GEB/self-reference/recursive-improvement philosophy likely predates the paper (physical notes), but the specific named technical claim is reactive. Claim removed from scoring to maintain ledger rigor.

claims.claim: Decentralized multi-agent consensus mesh — peer-to-peer agreement replacing central commander
claims.validation_ref: Agent Mesh Protocol (AMP) — open protocol for AI agents to find and call each other across organizational boundaries (GitHub Mar 2026); AgentMesh MESH — BFT-ordered MQTT, Hashgraph gossip, sub-100ms latency (Apr 2026)
claims.notes: VALIDATED — multiple production systems operational. AMP provides Agent Card discovery, session tokens, TLS + E2E encryption. AgentMesh ships with 292+ tests, enterprise SaaS control plane, MESH_CREDIT currency. MeshRescue demonstrates P2P swarm for emergency response. Core concept (decentralized consensus replacing central commander) presciently identified ~25 weeks ahead of production deployments.
